Importing Libraries¶

In [40]:
import pandas as pd
In [41]:
import numpy as np
In [42]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
In [43]:
import seaborn as sns
In [44]:
%matplotlib inline

Loading Dataset¶

In [45]:
epl_data=pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\Bhawy11\Desktop\MINI_PROJECT\EPL_20_21.csv")
epl_data.head()

Add two new columns¶

In [48]:
epl_data['MinsPerMatch']=(epl_data['Mins']/epl_data['Matches']).astype(int)
epl_data['GoalsPerMatch']=(epl_data['Goals']/epl_data['Matches']).astype(float)
epl_data.head()
Out[48]:
Name Club Nationality Position Age Matches Starts Mins Goals Assists Passes_Attempted Perc_Passes_Completed Penalty_Goals Penalty_Attempted xG xA Yellow_Cards Red_Cards MinsPerMatch GoalsPerMatch
0 Mason Mount Chelsea ENG MF,FW 21 36 32 2890 6 5 1881 82.3 1 1 0.21 0.24 2 0 80 0.166667
1 Edouard Mendy Chelsea SEN GK 28 31 31 2745 0 0 1007 84.6 0 0 0.00 0.00 2 0 88 0.000000
2 Timo Werner Chelsea GER FW 24 35 29 2602 6 8 826 77.2 0 0 0.41 0.21 2 0 74 0.171429
3 Ben Chilwell Chelsea ENG DF 23 27 27 2286 3 5 1806 78.6 0 0 0.10 0.11 3 0 84 0.111111
4 Reece James Chelsea ENG DF 20 32 25 2373 1 2 1987 85.0 0 0 0.06 0.12 3 0 74 0.031250
In [49]:
#total Goals
Total_Goals=epl_data['Goals'].sum()
print(Total_Goals)

986
In [50]:
Total_PenaltyGoals=epl_data['Penalty_Goals'].sum()
print(Total_PenaltyGoals)

102
In [51]:
Total_Penalty_Received=epl_data['Penalty_Attempted'].sum()
print(Total_Penalty_Received)

125

Pie chart for penalties missed vs scored¶

In [52]:
plt.figure(figsize = (13,6))
penalty_not_scored = epl_data['Penalty_Attempted'].sum() - Total_PenaltyGoals
data = [penalty_not_scored, Total_PenaltyGoals]
labels = ['Penalties Misses','Penalties Scored']
color_palette=sns.color_palette("Paired")
plt.pie(data,labels=labels,colors=color_palette,autopct='%.0f%%')
plt.show()

In [56]:
nationality = epl_data.groupby('Nationality').size().sort_values(ascending=False)
nationality.head(10).plot(kind='bar',figsize=(12,6),color=sns.color_palette('magma'))

<Axes: xlabel='Nationality'>
In [57]:
#clubs with max players in their squad

epl_data['Club'].value_counts().nlargest(5).plot(kind='bar',color=sns.color_palette("viridis"))
Out[57]:
<Axes: xlabel='Club'>
In [58]:
#clubs with latest players in their squad

epl_data['Club'].value_counts().nsmallest(5).plot(kind='bar',color=sns.color_palette("viridis"))
Out[58]:
<Axes: xlabel='Club'>
In [59]:
Under20 = epl_data[epl_data['Age']<=20]
Age20_25 = epl_data[(epl_data['Age']>20) & (epl_data['Age']<=25)]
Age25_30 = epl_data[(epl_data['Age']>25) & (epl_data['Age']<=30)]
Above30 = epl_data[epl_data['Age']>30]
In [60]:
x=np.array([Under20['Name'].count(),Age20_25['Name'].count(),Age25_30['Name'].count(),Above30['Name'].count()])
mylabels = ["<=20",">20 & <=25", ">25 & <=30", ">30"]
plt.title('Total Players with Age Groups',fontsize=20)
plt.pie(x,labels=mylabels,autopct="%.1f%%")
plt.show()
In [61]:
players_under_20 = epl_data[epl_data['Age']<20]
players_under_20['Club'].value_counts().plot(kind='bar', color=sns.color_palette("cubehelix"))
Out[61]:
<Axes: xlabel='Club'>

Total Assist from each club¶

In [68]:
Assists_by_club=pd.DataFrame(epl_data.groupby('Club', as_index=False)['Assists'].sum())
sns.set_theme(style='whitegrid',color_codes=True)
ax=sns.barplot(x='Club',y='Assists', data=Assists_by_club.sort_values(by='Assists'),palette='tab20')
ax.set_xlabel("Club",fontsize=30)
ax.set_ylabel("Assists",fontsize=20)
plt.xticks(rotation=75)
plt.rcParams['figure.figsize']=(20,8)
plt.title('Plot of Club vs Total Assists',fontsize=20)

C:\Users\Bhawy11\AppData\Local\Temp\ipykernel_3908\1120566133.py:3: FutureWarning: 

Passing `palette` without assigning `hue` is deprecated and will be removed in v0.14.0. Assign the `x` variable to `hue` and set `legend=False` for the same effect.

  ax=sns.barplot(x='Club',y='Assists', data=Assists_by_club.sort_values(by='Assists'),palette='tab20')
Out[68]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Plot of Club vs Total Assists')

In [70]:
# Creating a DataFrame to group the total goals scored by each club

Goals_by_clubs = pd.DataFrame(epl_data.groupby('Club', as_index = False)['Goals'].sum())
sns.set_theme(style ="whitegrid", color_codes = True)
ax = sns.barplot(x = 'Club', y = 'Goals', data = Goals_by_clubs.sort_values(by ="Goals"), palette = 'rocket')
ax.set_xlabel("Club", fontsize = 30)
ax.set_ylabel("Goals", fontsize = 20)
plt.xticks(rotation =75)
plt.rcParams["figure.figsize"] = (20, 8)
plt.title('Plot of Club vs Total Goals', fontsize = 20)

In [73]:
plt.figure(figsize = (14, 7))
assists = epl_data['Assists'].sum()
data = [Total_Goals - assists, assists]
labels = ['Goals without assists', 'Goals with assists']
color = sns.color_palette('Set2')
plt.pie(data, labels = labels, colors = color, autopct ='%.0f%%')
plt.title('Percentage of Goals with Assists', fontsize = 20)
plt.show()
In [74]:
epl_yellow = epl_data.sort_values(by = 'Yellow_Cards', ascending = False)[:10]
plt.figure(figsize = (20, 6))
plt.title("Players with the most yellow cards")
c = sns.barplot(x = epl_yellow['Name'], y = epl_yellow['Yellow_Cards'], label = 'Players', color ='yellow')
plt.ylabel('Number of Yellow Cards')
c.set_xticklabels(c.get_xticklabels(), rotation = 45)
plt.show()

C:\Users\Bhawy11\AppData\Local\Temp\ipykernel_3908\54215054.py:6: UserWarning: set_ticklabels() should only be used with a fixed number of ticks, i.e. after set_ticks() or using a FixedLocator.

plt.ylabel('Number of Red Cards')
c.set_xticklabels(c.get_xticklabels(), rotation = 45)

Performance Metrics¶

In [96]:
# Create Goals per 90
epl_data['Goals_per_90'] = ((epl_data['Goals'] / epl_data['Mins']) * 90).round(2)

# Show table
table = epl_data[['Name','Club','Goals','Matches','Goals_per_90']]

print(table.head(10))

                Name     Club  Goals  Matches  Goals_per_90
0        Mason Mount  Chelsea      6       36          0.19
1      Edouard Mendy  Chelsea      0       31          0.00
2        Timo Werner  Chelsea      6       35          0.21
3       Ben Chilwell  Chelsea      3       27          0.12
4        Reece James  Chelsea      1       32          0.04
5  César Azpilicueta  Chelsea      1       26          0.04
6       N'Golo Kanté  Chelsea      0       30          0.00
7           Jorginho  Chelsea      7       28          0.31
8       Thiago Silva  Chelsea      2       23          0.09
9         Kurt Zouma  Chelsea      5       24          0.22
In [101]:
# assists per 90

epl_data['Assists_per_90'] = ((epl_data['Assists'] / epl_data['Mins']) * 90).round(2)

table = epl_data[['Name','Club','Goals','Assists','Matches','Assists_per_90']]

print(table.head(10))

                Name     Club  Goals  Assists  Matches  Assists_per_90
0        Mason Mount  Chelsea      6        5       36            0.16
1      Edouard Mendy  Chelsea      0        0       31            0.00
2        Timo Werner  Chelsea      6        8       35            0.28
3       Ben Chilwell  Chelsea      3        5       27            0.20
4        Reece James  Chelsea      1        2       32            0.08
5  César Azpilicueta  Chelsea      1        2       26            0.08
6       N'Golo Kanté  Chelsea      0        2       30            0.08
7           Jorginho  Chelsea      7        1       28            0.04
8       Thiago Silva  Chelsea      2        0       23            0.00
9         Kurt Zouma  Chelsea      5        0       24            0.00
In [111]:
epl_data['Goal_Contribution'] = epl_data['Goals'] + epl_data['Assists']
epl_data['Contribution_per_90'] = (epl_data['Goal_Contribution'] / epl_data['Mins']) * 90

table1 = epl_data[['Name','Club','Goals','Assists','Matches','Contribution_per_90']].round(2)
table2 = epl_data[['Name','Club','Goals','Assists','Matches','Goal_Contribution']]

print(table1.head(10))
print(table2.head(10))

                Name     Club  Goals  Assists  Matches  Contribution_per_90

8       Thiago Silva  Chelsea      2        0       23                 0.09

top = epl_data.sort_values('Contribution_per_90', ascending=False).head(10)
sns.barplot(x='Contribution_per_90', y='Name', data=top)
Out[113]:
<Axes: xlabel='Contribution_per_90', ylabel='Name'>
In [117]:
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

corr = epl_data.corr(numeric_only=True)

plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))
sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm')
plt.title("Correlation Between Player Statistics")
plt.show()
In [ ]:
